creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Dirk Engling from comment #8)
>I will take a look and port it into ezjail base.

Perhaps temporarily, in the meantime, the patch could be committed directly to the port? When the new ezjail is released we'll get rid of this patch. What do you think about it Dirk?

BTW, ezjail works just fine, I am running tens of jails, including VNET ones, using this piece of software. Good job, thank you !
